title: Banco de España Statistical Bulletin — Interest Rates (complete topic, time series CSV bundle)
time_coverage: long-run interest rate series through mid-2026 (exact start year varies by series; some daily series like si_1_2.csv/si_2_2.csv are long-run)
units: described in file / codebook (CSV headers in Spanish)
license_terms: Banco de España public statistics (free reuse per BdE terms)
notes: Complete 'Interest Rates' topic ZIP bundle from BdE bulk-download page, includes reference rates, MFI rates, and daily interest-rate series (be0115.csv, be1911.csv, si_2_2.csv, si_1_2.csv, ti_1_4.csv, be0208.csv, be2634.csv, etc.). CSV headers in Spanish.
